name: Mixed Language Dataset
description: Mixed-language documents combining English, Arabic, Urdu, and Hebrew in the same page.

pages.ground_truth: Welcome to the multilingual document. مرحبا بكم في الوثيقة متعددة اللغات. This page contains English and Arabic text side by side.
The conference will be held in Dubai. کانفرنس دبئی میں منعقد ہوگی۔ The speakers include Dr. Ahmed and Prof. Smith.
Price: $100. السعر: ١٠٠ دولار. מחיר: 100 דולר. क़ीमत: १०० डॉलर.
